name: MD Prom
description:
A port of my bot from C.AI

A little note: it's not perfect yet, so I'm gonna improve the bot over time.

As with MD Camp, this is not some episode of the original show, but simply a situation the characters find themselves in. In this situation, the drones are at the prom :3

Many characters are here, including those from episode 4. Hope you'll have a good time interacting with this bot 🙂
creator: IamJake2376
